pi_items.source: verifier.py scoring bounds (encloses full cone FOV of 60.0 based on 30 deg off-nadir)
verifier.py scoring bounds (encloses full cone FOV of 60.0 based on 30 deg off-nadir)

privileged_info_summary: The task generates synthetic target coordinates and orbit parameters in setup_task.sh via a heredoc string to /home/ga/Desktop/eo_targets.txt. The true ground-centric minimum elevation angle derived from the 30-degree off-nadir constraint, Earth radius 6378.1363 km, and altitude 500 km is mathematically 57.37 degrees, which correctly falls within the tolerance window of 56.0 to 58.5 degrees defined by the metadata and verifier. The alternative ConicalFOV constraint correctly uses a full-cone angle of 60 degrees (bounded by 59.9 and 60.1). The required outputs are explicitly scripted as /home/ga/GMAT_output/agile_targeting.script and /home/ga/GMAT_output/accessibility_summary.txt.
